title: Lorenz Attractor
description: Explore the iconic strange attractor arising from Lorenz's equations for atmospheric convection, rendered in interactive 3D. Adjust parameters to reveal bifurcations and sensitive dependence on initial conditions.
interactive_controls: σ, ρ, β inputs: set Lorenz equation parameters
Standard: classic butterfly attractor (σ=10, ρ=28, β=8/3)
Chaos Demo: three particles with nearly identical initial conditions
Restart: reset trajectories with current parameters
Reset View: restore default camera angle
Click and drag to orbit the 3D view
